changelog: 1.3.2 (Build 25): Extracted Tracker/Episodes view into external component - loads on demand
1.3.1 (Build 24): Extracted Objectifs/Kanban view into external component - loads on demand
1.3.0 (Build 23): Extracted Contacts view into external component - loads on demand
1.2.9 (Build 22): Deferred view/preferences event listeners - all UI events attach after DOM ready

1.2.2 (Build 15): Reorganize project structure - move .md files to docs, .js files to src/lib
1.2.1 (Build 14): Add Tailwind CSS and FontAwesome integration
1.1.1 (Build 4): Fix login form clearing, user menu Chrome compatibility, scrollbar positioning
1.1.0 (Build 3): Add UI enhancements - header alignment, dropdown menu, profile modal, version footer
